idea-plugin.name: Koog Strategy Graph
idea-plugin.description:
Inline visualization for Koog agent strategy { ... } DSL blocks.

A gutter icon next to every recognized strategy(...) call opens a popup with a layered graph of all val x by nodeXxx() nodes and edge(a forwardTo b) connections in that block. Layout is computed by the Eclipse Layout Kernel; rendering is pure Swing — no external tools are required.
